name: My Talking Sprunki
description: Welcome to the musical world of Sprunki — cute and funny creatures full of joy and silliness! There’s always something fun to do: dress them up, fly around, or play real tunes on the magic piano! What can you do? Dress up your Sprunki in silly outfits and fun styles Color them any way you like — go wild with creativity! Talk and laugh with over 100 funny voice lines Decorate and fix up their cozy little home Launch Sprunki into the air and watch them float around Play on the magic piano and collect melodies Complete fun tasks and play mini-games to earn coins!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
